utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully detailed: the 'property' section includes name, type, location, details, price, condo fees, and taxes; 'financing' covers method, amount, remaining assets, and notes; 'legal_services' includes provider, breakdown of costs, and total; 'moving_services' lists provider, cost, and included services; 'setup_services' lists utilities, internet, water, insurance, and estimated costs; 'total_budget' provides a full cost breakdown and confirmation within budget. All items are complete and fully specified according to the requested format.
